studio_presets.BR Prog Anthem: Genre: Brazilian Progressive Trance. Bassline: Offbeat bouncing, rolling bass. Drums: Punchy kick, tight closed hi-hats. FX: Sweep filters, laser zaps, subtle vocal chants. Vibe: High energy, festival mainstage.
studio_presets.Dark Ritual: Genre: Darkpsy / Forest. Bassline: Fast 150+ BPM, galloping triplet bass. Drums: Heavy, driving percussion, industrial snare. FX: Organic squelches, eerie atmospheres, tribal chants. Vibe: Deep, mysterious, psychedelic.

cover_bypass_methods: Instrumental intro, evolving to full spectrum

questions.text: E qual a faixa de BPM (velocidade)?
Como deve ser o estilo da Bassline?
Qual o estilo principal dos efeitos (FX)?
Por último, como você quer estruturar a intro / cover bypass?
